en_title: Factorio Set for Its Last Major Update, a Decade After Launch
cn_title: 《异星工厂》十年后迎来最后一次重大更新
subtitle: 再见了，老朋友
opus_summary: 开发商Wube Software宣布，《异星工厂》将在推出十年后迎来最后一次重大更新2.1版。该更新专注于生活质量和模组改进，不会增加新星球或敌人。2.1版将于6月底发布实验版，之后开发重心将转向长期支持。

paragraphs.en: Factorio is set for its last major update soon, developer Wube Software has announced in a blog post .
paragraphs.cn: 开发商Wube Software在一篇博客文章中宣布，《异星工厂》即将迎来最后一次重大更新。

paragraphs.en: The influential strategy game about building and creating automated factories launched on Steam in early access form in February 2016, before launching proper in August 2020. It is a huge hit for Wube, one of those eternal Steam games with addictive gameplay mechanics, complex systems, and near infinite replayability. Factorio, which has seen superb support over the years, is credited with popularising the factory-building and automation genre on PC, and retains an ‘Overwhelmingly Positive’ user review rating on Valve’s platform.
paragraphs.cn: 这款关于建造和创建自动化工厂、极具影响力的策略游戏于2016年2月在Steam以抢先体验形式上线，随后于2020年8月正式发售。它是Wube的巨大成功之作，属于那种凭借令人上瘾的游戏机制、复杂的系统和近乎无限的重玩性而长盛不衰的Steam游戏。《异星工厂》多年来获得了极佳的支持，被认为在PC上普及了工厂建造和自动化这一游戏类型，并在Valve的平台上保持着「好评如潮」的用户评价。

paragraphs.en: "I can’t imagine how different Steam gaming landscape would have been if there was no Factorio," John “Bucky” Buckley, communications director and publishing manager for Palworld developer Pocketpair, said in a post on social media . "Thank you for making an incredible game!"
paragraphs.cn: 「我无法想象如果没有《异星工厂》，Steam的游戏格局会有多大的不同，」《幻兽帕鲁》开发商Pocketpair的传播总监兼发行经理John “Bucky” Buckley在社交媒体上发帖说，「感谢你们制作了这款不可思议的游戏！」

paragraphs.en: Managing expectations on the scope of the 2.1 update, Wube said: “Generally, we are happy with the game design of Factorio and Space age. The progression is good, things are mostly well balanced (one or two exceptions), and there isn't anything we feel is majorly missing. That is to say, we didn't go into 2.1 development with grand designs of large new pieces of content or huge features.”
paragraphs.cn: 在管理玩家对2.1更新规模的预期时，Wube表示：「总的来说，我们对《异星工厂》和《太空时代》的游戏设计感到满意。游戏进程很好，各方面大多平衡良好（有一两个例外），我们不觉得有什么重大缺失。也就是说，我们并没有带着推出大型新内容或庞大功能的宏伟计划来开发2.1。」

paragraphs.en: To that end, the 2.1 update will focus on quality-of-life improvements, add some “small” features, polish the game in some areas, and makes improvements to modding. It will not add new planets, enemies, or research trees or resource chains.
paragraphs.cn: 因此，2.1更新将专注于生活质量改进，添加一些「小型」功能，在某些方面打磨游戏，并改进模组支持。它不会增加新的星球、敌人、科技树或资源链。

paragraphs.en: Wube will spend the next few weeks in closed beta testing, with an experimental 2.1 release set for the end of June. “Once released, we will have the usual bugfixing, before our summer vacations start in July,” the developer added. “Importantly, we plan to keep 2.1 as experimental over the whole summer (I.E, not mark it stable), so that mod authors will have plenty of time to update.”
paragraphs.cn: Wube将在接下来的几周内进行封闭测试，2.1实验版计划于6月底发布。「发布后，我们会进行常规的错误修复，然后7月就开始放暑假了，」开发商补充道，「重要的是，我们计划让2.1在整个夏天都保持实验版状态（即不标记为稳定版），这样模组作者就有充足的时间来更新。」

paragraphs.en: Long-term, though, 2.1 signals the end of major updates for Factorio.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，从长远来看，2.1标志着《异星工厂》重大更新的终结。

paragraphs.en: “We envision 2.1 as our last major update of Factorio, and we will shift the focus onto long term support,” Wube explained. “So things like bug fixes, platform support/compatibility, modding features, etc. Other than that we feel we've reached a good place to conclude the active gameplay development.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们设想2.1是《异星工厂》的最后一次重大更新，之后我们会将重心转移到长期支持上，」Wube解释道，「比如错误修复、平台支持/兼容性、模组功能等。除此之外，我们觉得已经达到了一个可以结束活跃玩法开发的好节点。」

paragraphs.en: So, an end of an era for Factorio, but Wube is already working on other projects. Just don’t expect to hear about them for a while (“honestly there will not be anything to share for a long time”).
paragraphs.cn: 因此，《异星工厂》的一个时代结束了，但Wube已经在着手其他项目。只是别指望短期内能听到相关消息（「老实说，很长一段时间内都不会有任何东西可以分享」）。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
